text: The service at this restaurant was absolutely incredible, but the food was surprisingly bland for the price.
I can't believe they cancelled the event without any notice. At least they offered full refunds.
This product works exactly as advertised. Nothing more, nothing less.
While the movie had stunning visuals, the plot felt like a rehash of every other superhero film.
My experience with customer support was frustrating at first, but the supervisor resolved everything quickly.
The new update completely broke the app. I've lost all my saved data.
It's a decent laptop for the price range. Battery life could be better though.
Honestly, this is the best purchase I've made all year. Highly recommend to everyone!
The hotel room was clean but tiny. The location made up for it somewhat.
I don't understand why people rave about this book. I found it tedious and predictable.
